purpose: Every `as never` in cli/src + mcp/src must be eliminated or annotated `KEEP as never` (documented generated-type bug). The residual unannotated budget ratchets to 0; the two forwarding seams (result.ts, output-schema.ts) are exempt by path. As of 2026-06-20 the expenses/invoices list-pagination casts were dropped after the corrected OpenAPI gained page/page-size on those list requests, so those requests now pass directly (only their wider live response envelopes are narrowed). The annotated `KEEP as never` residue is now small and documented: response-narrows, the multipart-file omission on expense create/update scalar bodies, and the status-naming Bucket-C mismatch on time-off / time-entry list+status writes. Request-side escapes that survive type-checking route through the sanctioned `wireBody<T>` typed bridge (clockify-sdk-ts-115/requests), not bare `as never`.

cli: cli/src/commands/expenses.ts (expense update scalar body omits the generated multipart file)
mcp: mcp/src/tools/expenses.ts (expense create + update scalar bodies omit the generated multipart file)
mcp/src/tools/invoices.ts (invoice status PATCH body generated too narrowly)
mcp/src/tools/timeOff.ts (policy archive live `archived` body vs generated status naming)
mcp/src/tools/workflows/review.ts + mcp/src/tools/workflows/resolve.ts (timeEntries.listForUser list/search/view request+response envelope does not match the wire shape)

residueNotes.wireBodyEscapes: Request casts that previously rode bare `as never` and still cannot satisfy the generated type pass through the sanctioned `wireBody<T>` typed bridge instead: invoices.list (statuses filter slot absent from ListInvoicesRequest), invoices.update on create/update (replace body rebuilt from live GET fields), invoiceItems.import (open `extra` passthrough wider than generated), timeOffPolicies.create (generated-required approve omitted) / update (carried-forward body), projects.create (conditional-spread widening under exactOptionalPropertyTypes), and the CLI expenses.list / webhooks.list / timeOff.list list filters (generated request drops start/end or narrows type/statuses to a literal union the CLI surfaces as free-form).
residueNotes.droppedOn2026-06-20: Both the expenses.list and invoices.list pagination casts (cli + mcp) plus the AddUserWorkspacesRequestFlattened invite cast (cli users.ts, mcp users.ts) were removed once the regenerated request types matched: the spec gained page/page-size on the expense/invoice list requests and the flattened add-user request now carries {workspaceId, email, send-email} exactly. The mcp timeEntries.update local body is now typed via ClockifyRequestBody<UpdateTimeEntriesRequest>, and the mcp timeOff.list request-search dropped BOTH its request cast and response narrow (typed ListTimeOffRequest + TimeOffRequestsResponse). Net: cli annotated KEEP-as-never 5->1, mcp 22->7.
residueNotes.droppedOn2026-06-21: After the GOCLMCP re-snapshot: expenseCategories.list and timeOffPolicies.list shed their wireBody (the list request gained page/page-size; timeOffPolicies page is sent as the typed string "1"), and expenseCategories.list now unwraps the {count,categories} envelope before name-matching; changeTimeOffRequestStatus drops its wireBody for a clean body-envelope bind now that the generated note is optional upstream.

wrapper.resolvedNote: All four strictness flags are ON for the wrapper compile (2026-06-22). The EOPT/TS4114 blockers were in the GENERATED error scaffold (src/errors/*, src/api/errors/*) + src/core/request.ts and were fixed at their source in this repo's local SDK generator scripts/generate-sdk-from-openapi.mjs (override on the cause members; explicit `| undefined` on optional scaffold props; signal `?? null`), NOT upstream in ../GOCLMCP/ (which owns only the OpenAPI spec). The former hand-written-only EOPT differential gate in check-consumer-cast-budget.mjs was retired now that `npm run type-check` enforces exactOptionalPropertyTypes + noImplicitOverride across the whole wrapper. See spec/evidence/discrepancies.md strictness.wrapper-eopt-noimplicitoverride-blocked (resolved).
